title: Tinc Festive Multicolour Retractable Ballpoint Pen 6-in-1 Colour Ballpoint Pens for School Office Home | Reindeer Character (MLTCKREIN)
features: INTRODUCING OUR CUTE FESTIVE REINDEER TO THE TINC FAMILY - With his red nose shining bright, feel the Christmassy vibes with your very own reindeer ball point pen!

RETRACTABLE PENS - This retractable ballpoint pen comes with multiple coloured ballpoint pen nibs, you're spoilt for choice! Perfect for writing your special letter to Santa or a Thank You note to your loved ones!
Impress your friends with the cutest writing pen for school! Our ballpoint pens are the perfect addition to any pencil case and would be fabulous in a party bag or as a stocking filler!
STAND OUT FROM THE CROWD - Now you can be with your own quality Tinc products that are fun and safe to use - Stand out from the crowd with our stylishly designed lifestyle stationery & accessories!

MADE BY Tinc - At Tinc we pride ourselves on making premium and practical products that both kids and parents can both enjoy whether at school or at home - Made by Tinc, the home of colourful and creative stationery
description: Tinc Reindeer Character Multicolour Retractable Ballpoint Pen 6-in-1 Colour Ballpoint Pens for School Office Home, Festive Pen, Great Stocking Filler or Party Bag Gift
